title: MockServer expectation(s)
description: A MockServer expectation, or an array of expectations (initialization JSON). Generated from mockserver-core — do not hand-edit.

timestamp.description: added to allow request and response log output to be used to create expectations

openAPIDefinition.title: open api or swagger request matcher

httpForward.title: host and port to forward to

httpForwardValidateAction.title: forward and validate against OpenAPI spec

httpForwardWithFallback.title: forward with fallback response on failure

graphqlSubscriptionFilter.description: GraphQL subscription query filter for graphql-transport-ws protocol. When set, incoming subscribe messages are AST-matched against this filter.

grpcBidiResponse.title: gRPC bidi response for bidirectional streaming

dropConnectionProbability.description: Probability (0.0 to 1.0) of dropping the TCP connection without sending any response

outageAfterMillis.description: Time-based outage window: chaos becomes active this many milliseconds after the expectation's first match (measured via the controllable clock)

outageDurationMillis.description: Time-based outage window: chaos stays active for this many milliseconds then self-heals; omit for an unbounded outage

truncateBodyAtFraction.description: Corrupt the response body by keeping only this leading fraction (0.0 to 1.0) of its bytes

malformedBody.description: Corrupt the response body by appending a broken-JSON fragment so it fails to parse

slowResponseChunkSize.description: Dribble the response body in chunks of this many bytes; requires slowResponseChunkDelay to slow the response

quotaName.description: Stateful quota: shared counter key; expectations with the same quotaName share one rate-limit counter

quotaLimit.description: Stateful quota: max requests allowed per window before requests are rejected

quotaWindowMillis.description: Stateful quota: fixed-window length in milliseconds

quotaErrorStatus.description: Stateful quota: status returned when the quota is exceeded (default 429)

degradationRampMillis.description: Gradual degradation: ramp errorProbability and dropConnectionProbability linearly from 0 to their configured values over this many milliseconds from the first match

graphqlErrors.description: Rewrite the response body as a GraphQL error envelope (HTTP 200, {"data":null,"errors":[...]})

graphqlErrorMessage.description: The error message in errors[0].message; defaults to 'simulated GraphQL error' when graphqlErrors is true and this is unset

graphqlErrorCode.description: Optional value for errors[0].extensions.code (e.g. 'INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR'); extensions object is omitted when unset

graphqlNullifyData.description: When true (default), data is null; when false, attempt to preserve the original response body JSON as the data value

stringOrJsonSchema.title: string value that can be support nottable, optional or a json schema

distribution.description: distribution for variable delays: UNIFORM requires min and max, LOG_NORMAL requires median and p99, GAUSSIAN requires mean and stdDev

socketAddress.title: remote address to send request to

timestamp.description: added to allow request and response log output to be used to create expectations
